channel.title: development on LucianDavies
channel.description: Recent content in development on LucianDavies

item.title: Rust - Basics
item.description: Introduction Basics Structs, Enums and Matching Filesystem and Processes Modules and Cargo Standard Library Containers Error Handling Threads, Networking and Sharing Object-Oriented Programming Parsing with Nom Pain Points

item.title: Touch Typing Quest (Intro)
item.description: Since the beginning of time I have always wanted to type really fast but with so many things to do the benefits haven’t always been clear. In the spirit of learning new things I am to attempt this quest again but this time document my efforts. As a software developer strong typing skills can be an assets despite software development being short bursts of typing instead of the long stream we see in other professions.
